summary: Iteration 23: 4-feature batch testing complete - Dashboard widget customization, Weekly/Monthly digest scheduler, Mobile card views for Expenses/Employees/Stock, and Responsive headings. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login successful (ss@ssc.com)
Backend: GET /api/scheduler/config returns 5 jobs including weekly_digest and monthly_digest
Backend: weekly_digest has day_of_week field (default: sun)
Backend: monthly_digest has day field (default: 1)
Backend: PUT /api/scheduler/config/weekly_digest accepts day_of_week field
Backend: PUT /api/scheduler/config/monthly_digest accepts day field
Backend: POST /api/scheduler/trigger/weekly_digest generates period digest
Backend: POST /api/scheduler/trigger/monthly_digest generates period digest
Backend: GET /api/scheduler/logs shows recent triggers
Backend: Scheduler job channels (whatsapp/email) update correctly
Backend: Scheduler job time (hour/minute) update correctly
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats works
Backend: GET /api/expenses returns list
Backend: GET /api/employees returns list
Backend: GET /api/employees/pending-summary works
Backend: GET /api/stock/balance returns list
Frontend: Dashboard Customize button opens widget settings dialog
Frontend: Widget settings dialog has toggle switches for all dashboard sections (stats, charts, cashBank, paymentMode, spending, dues, vatSummary)
Frontend: Toggling widget off hides section from dashboard
Frontend: Widget preferences persist in localStorage (key: dashboard_widgets)
Frontend: Dashboard heading has responsive classes (text-2xl sm:text-4xl)
Frontend: Settings > Scheduler tab shows 5 jobs
Frontend: Weekly Digest job has day-of-week selector (Sun-Sat)
Frontend: Monthly Digest job has day-of-month selector (Day 1-28)
Frontend: Test buttons available for all scheduler jobs
Frontend: Recent Scheduler Logs section shows completed jobs
Frontend: Expenses page shows mobile card view with sm:hidden class pattern
Frontend: Expenses mobile cards show category, amount, date, payment mode
Frontend: Employees page shows mobile card view with employee info + View/Pay/Leave buttons
Frontend: Stock page shows mobile card view with In/Used/Balance/Value columns
Frontend: Stock heading has responsive classes (text-2xl sm:text-4xl)
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard widget customization uses localStorage key 'dashboard_widgets' for persistence
Widget toggle switches are custom implementations (not Shadcn Switch) with emerald-500 active color
getWidgetPrefs() merges DEFAULT_WIDGETS with localStorage for graceful defaults
Scheduler config API ensures new job types (weekly_digest, monthly_digest) are created for existing users
Mobile card views use sm:hidden for cards and hidden sm:block for desktop tables
All responsive headings use text-2xl sm:text-4xl pattern consistently
seed_data_creation: No new seed data - used existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 complete. New features tested: 1) Dashboard widget customization - settings dialog with toggle switches, localStorage persistence works. 2) Scheduler weekly/monthly digest - 5 jobs in Settings > Scheduler tab, day-of-week selector for weekly, day-of-month selector (1-28) for monthly. 3) Mobile card views - Expenses, Employees, Stock pages all have sm:hidden mobile cards and hidden sm:block desktop tables. 4) Responsive headings - text-2xl sm:text-4xl pattern across Dashboard, Expenses, Employees, Stock pages. All features working correctly.
